summary: Iteration 13: P2 Features Testing - All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified District Chat page, Profile page with Telegram link card, Streak card with milestones, and navigation. All new features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Cookie banner overlays send button, blocking click interaction

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/streak/checkin - creates/updates daily streak, returns current/max/reward (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/streak/checkin - second call same day returns already_checked=True (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/streak - returns current streak info with history (200)
BACKEND: Streak endpoints require authentication (401)
BACKEND: GET /api/chats/district - returns messages for user's district (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/chats/district - posts message to district chat (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/chats/district - validates message length (400 for <2 or >1000 chars)
BACKEND: POST /api/chats/district - rejects if no district set in profile (400)
BACKEND: District chat endpoints require authentication (401)
BACKEND: POST /api/telegram/link - creates linking code and deep_link (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/telegram/status - returns linked status (200)
BACKEND: Telegram endpoints require authentication (401)
BACKEND: POST /api/org/{org_id}/respond/{review_id} - admin can respond to reviews (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/reviews/{review_id}/response - returns org response or empty (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/org/{org_id}/responses - returns all org responses (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/org-manager - admin only, sets user as org_manager (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/org/{org_id}/respond/{review_id} - org_manager can respond (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/org/{org_id}/respond/{review_id} - validates text length (400)
BACKEND: POST /api/org/{org_id}/respond/{review_id} - returns 404 for non-existent review
BACKEND: Streak rewards milestones configured (3,7,14,30,60,100 days)
FRONTEND: /district-chat page loads with chat UI (data-testid='district-chat-page')
FRONTEND: District chat shows district name 'Октябрьский' in header
FRONTEND: District chat has message input (data-testid='chat-input')
FRONTEND: District chat has send button (data-testid='chat-send')
FRONTEND: District chat displays existing messages
FRONTEND: Profile page shows Telegram link card (data-testid='telegram-link-card')
FRONTEND: Telegram link button generates code and deep_link
FRONTEND: Profile page shows Streak card (data-testid='streak-card')
FRONTEND: Streak card shows milestones (3д, 7д, 14д, 30д, 60д, 100д)
FRONTEND: Profile page shows Mood selector (data-testid='mood-selector-card')
FRONTEND: Navigation sidebar has District Chat link (data-testid='nav-district-chat')

critical_code_review_comments: Streak system with milestone rewards working (3,7,14,30,60,100 days)
District chats geo-fenced by user's district field
Telegram bot integration ready (token configured, webhook may not work in preview)
Organization responses with org_manager role working
Minor: Cookie banner z-index overlays chat send button
seed_data_creation: Set test-user-council-2 as org_manager for org_seed_001 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested P2 features: 1) Streak system - POST/GET /api/streak/checkin and /api/streak for daily check-ins with milestone rewards at 3,7,14,30,60,100 days. Auto-checkin on profile page load. 2) District chats - GET/POST /api/chats/district for geo-fenced messaging by user's district field. 3) Telegram integration - POST /api/telegram/link creates linking code, GET /api/telegram/status checks linked status. Bot token configured (8762275818:AAFi0R_fTT9oovAyp5LuEDq0nfEjYqm3P4Y). 4) Organization responses - POST /api/org/{org_id}/respond/{review_id} for org_manager/admin to respond to reviews, GET /api/reviews/{review_id}/response to get response. POST /api/admin/org-manager to set user as org_manager. Frontend has DistrictChatPage, TelegramLink and StreakCard components in ProfilePage.

mocked_apis.telegram_webhook: Telegram webhook callbacks can't be tested in preview environment, but API endpoints work

district_chats.geo_fencing: Messages filtered by user's district field
